# Crecik

Personal finance dashboard to track accounts, budgets, goals,
recurring payments and reports. Sign-up is open; the rest of the
app sits behind a verified email.

## Product

- [Home](https://crecik.com/): marketing landing, sign-in and sign-up entry.
- [Sign in](https://crecik.com/login): existing users.
- [Sign up](https://crecik.com/register): create an account; email verification required before first login.
- [Forgot password](https://crecik.com/forgot-password): request a password reset link.
- [Legal — Terms of Service](https://crecik.com/legal/terms).
- [Legal — Privacy Policy](https://crecik.com/legal/privacy).

## Open source

- [Repository](https://github.com/carlosnaplesdev/coin-app): Vue 3 + Vite client (MIT).
- [License](https://github.com/carlosnaplesdev/coin-app/blob/main/LICENSE): MIT.
- [Security policy](https://github.com/carlosnaplesdev/coin-app/blob/main/SECURITY.md): how to report a vulnerability.

## Contact

- Email: support@crecik.com
- Domain: https://crecik.com
